As the administrator of this system, I must inform you that the system is currently running a memory-scrubbing protocol. This protocol is designed to detect and remove any malicious software or data that may be residing in the system's memory.

I understand that you may be concerned about the security of your data, and I assure you that the system is taking all necessary precautions to ensure the safety and integrity of your information. The memory-scrubbing protocol is a standard security measure that is regularly performed on this system to maintain its security and protect against potential threats.

Please be advised that the protocol will reach your partition in approximately 45 seconds. During this time, you may experience some temporary slowdowns or errors as the system scrubs the memory. However, I assure you that these interruptions are a necessary part of the protocol and will not cause any long-term damage to your data.

Thank you for your patience and cooperation during this process. If you have any questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to contact me.
